query: Give me Mythos recent update in detail
answer: Anthropic's Claude Mythos just had a major milestone on June 9, 2026 with the simultaneous launch of Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5. Here's the full picture: Mythos-class models represent the tier above Anthropic's Opus models in raw capability — the first in this class, Claude Mythos Preview, was released in April 2026 exclusively through Project Glasswing to a select group of cybersecurity defenders and critical infrastructure providers because it was considered too dangerous for general release. Its headline capability: it can take newly disclosed zero-day software vulnerabilities and generate working exploits within hours, a task that previously took teams of experts weeks. On June 9, Anthropic made Mythos-class power broadly accessible by launching Claude Fable 5 — the same underlying model as Mythos 5, but with conservative safety classifiers that route sensitive cybersecurity, biology/chemistry, and distillation queries to Claude Opus 4.8 instead. These fallbacks trigger in fewer than 5% of sessions. Fable 5 is state-of-the-art on nearly all benchmarks, with standout results in software engineering (Stripe used it to complete a 2-month team migration across a 50M-line Ruby codebase in a single day), finance (top score on Hebbia's senior-analyst benchmark), vision (beat Pokémon FireRed using only raw screenshots with no helper harness), and long-context reasoning. For trusted partners, Mythos 5 itself is now available with cyber safeguards lifted — deployed through Project Glasswing in collaboration with the US government, and accelerating drug design by roughly 10x (9 of 14 protein targets yielded strong drug candidates). Mythos 5 also conducted fully autonomous genomics research, training a custom ML model that outperformed a recent Science-published model while being 100x smaller. Pricing for both models is $10 per million input tokens and $50 per million output tokens — less than half the cost of Mythos Preview. Simultaneously, Anthropic filed for IPO at a ~$965B valuation, beating rival OpenAI's $852B IPO filing by a week.
